channel.title: stuff on ngdnhtien
channel.description: Recent content in stuff on ngdnhtien

item.title: Germans' Blitzkrieg versus Tay Son
item.description: Preface I’ve been gravitating towards educational programs on Netflix recently. One of the most impressive shows so far is the Greatest Events in World War II, in which new, radical perspectives on the most remarkable battles of Germany against Allies are presented with doctored footages in colour. The first episode demystifies the terminology of Blitzkrieg. It is a tactical warfare methodology, which inherits the essence of the German distinctive war philosophy: fast-paced attack — lightning strike.
